title: Cherry Jamaican Crumble
description: A delicious vegetarian dessert featuring cherries and a crumbly topping with a hint of Jamaican spices.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine cherries, rum cake mix, granulated sugar, and evaporated milk.
Mix well until cherries are evenly coated.
In a separate bowl, combine flour, cold unsalted butter, and flaky crust mix.
Use a pastry blender or your fingers to work the butter into the flour mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Pour the crumb mixture evenly over the cherry mixture.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the filling is bubbly.
Let cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
Serve warm with a scoop of vanilla ice cream, if desired.
